project_privacy_data_flows.description: User contributions fetched from MediaWiki API for display in UserContribListActivity. Shows user's edit history across all namespaces.

flow_steps.details: User opens their contributions page to view edit history.

flow_steps.code: @GET(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=query&list=usercontribs&ucprop=ids|title|timestamp|comment|size|flags|sizediff|tags&meta=userinfo&uiprop=groups|blockinfo|editcount|latestcontrib|rights|registrationdate") suspend fun getUserContributions(@Query("ucuser") username: String, @Query("uclimit") maxCount: Int, ...)
flow_steps.details: Username sent to API. Returns edit history including page titles, timestamps, comments, size diffs, tags, and user's group/block/edit count info.
